en: What are we doing? >> You know, you can tell a lot about a woman by the contents of her purse, but maybe that's not what you had in mind.
ko: 우리 지금 뭐 하는 거야? 있잖아, 여자 가방 속 물건만 봐도 많은 걸 알 수 있지만, 아마 네가 원하는 건 그게 아니겠지.

en: >> Mr. Incredible. >> No, it's all right. And I've got him.
ko: 미스터 인크레더블. 아니, 괜찮아. 내가 잡았으니까.

en: >> Sure you've got him. I just took him out for you. >> Sure you took him out. His attention was on me.
ko: 잡긴 뭘 잡아. 내가 널 위해 제압한 거잖아. 제압은 무슨, 걔 시선은 나한테 있었거든.

en: >> A fact I exploited to do my job. >> My job? You mean >> a simple thank you will suffice.
ko: 그걸 이용해서 내 일을 한 거지. 네 일? 그러니까... 고맙다고 한마디만 하면 되는데.

en: >> Thanks, but I don't need any help. >> Whatever happened to ladies first?
ko: 고맙지만, 도움 필요 없어. 레이디 퍼스트는 어디 간 거야?

en: >> Well, whatever happened to equal treatment? >> Hey, look. Wait. The lady got me first.
ko: 그럼 남녀평등은 어디 간 건데? 어, 잠깐만. 저 여자가 먼저 날 잡았어.

en: >> Well, we could share you. >> I work alone. >> Well, I think you need to be more flexible.
ko: 나눠 가지면 되지. 난 혼자 일해. 좀 더 유연해질 필요가 있을 것 같은데.

en: >> Are you doing anything later? I have a previous engagement.
ko: 나중에 시간 있어? 이미 선약이 있어서.
